name: Game Day Gear
address: 1982 W Grand River Ave Suite 510, Okemos, MI 48864
about: Game Day Gear is a retail venue specializing in Michigan collegiate apparel, located within the Meridian Mall in Okemos, Michigan. The store shares space with MAC Legends Indoor Golf, offering a unique combination of merchandise and golf simulation services. With a wide selection of apparel for various Michigan universities, including Michigan State, University of Michigan, Grand Valley, and Central Michigan, it caters to fans and families seeking team merchandise. While primarily a retail store, its co-location with an indoor golf simulator provides additional entertainment options for shoppers.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient location within a mall setting
Shared space with MAC Legends Indoor Golf for additional golf activities
Wide selection of Michigan collegiate merchandise for golf fans
Family-friendly environment with something for all ages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: As a retail store, Game Day Gear primarily sells merchandise. Club requirements would depend on the services offered by their adjacent indoor golf simulator, MAC Legends Indoor Golf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed, as this appears to be primarily a retail store.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time requirements for 18 holes are not specified, as this is primarily a retail store with adjacent golf simulator services.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Game Day Gear is described as family-friendly with merchandise available for the whole family.
